name: 40 MG Propranolol Hydrochloride Tablets IP
about: 40 MG Propranolol Hydrochloride Tablets IP are a type of general medicine that is commonly used to treat hypertension, angina, and certain types of arrhythmia. Each box contains 10*10 tablets, with each tablet containing 40mg of Propranolol Hydrochloride. These tablets are to be taken as per the doctors suggestion. These tablets are manufactured in India and are available in a physical form of tablets. To maintain the efficacy of the medicine, it is recommended to store them in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of 40 MG Propranolol Hydrochloride Tablets IP?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of 40 MG Propranolol Hydrochloride Tablets IP is as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the origin of the medicine?
faq.a: The medicine is manufactured in India.

faq.q: What is the physical form of the medicine?
faq.a: The medicine is available in the form of tablets.

faq.q: What is the packaging of 40 MG Propranolol Hydrochloride Tablets IP?
faq.a: The packaging of 40 MG Propranolol Hydrochloride Tablets IP is 10*10 tablets per box.

faq.q: How should 40 MG Propranolol Hydrochloride Tablets IP be stored?
faq.a: It is recommended to store 40 MG Propranolol Hydrochloride Tablets IP in a dry and cool place.
